Forward 2026 projection (Basketball-Monster style) on 2025 actuals — swaps to live data in-season. PG = per-game value · TOT = total value with replacement games (missed games hurt) · GP/M = projected games & minutes · pV…toV = per-category value. Set role changes in data/overrides/minutes.csv.

Generated by the Dynasty Hoops ranker · CONS = consensus-injected (no 2025 statline). Top tabs & team tables work with no JavaScript; the player-board dropdowns & editor use JavaScript.
